channel.title: Posts on The Justis Zone
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on The Justis Zone

item.title: 2021 Game of the Year
item.description: Year Summary One of the things that stuck out to me was how much I wanted to do the act of “grinding,” where you just do a repetitive task for moderate character improvement, in video games in 2021.

item.title: The Active Reload in Returnal Should Feel Better
item.description: I’m only a couple hours into the video game Returnal and I’ve come to a strange realization - The active reload is using the wrong stimuli for how my brain works.

item.title: A Blog Appears
item.description: Welcome to my blog. Go check the about page and see what’s up about me. I don’t really have much of a plan for writing here yet but, you can probably expect to find my thoughts on Video Games, table top games, and maybe some IT related topics.
